Complex order compliance — actual PDBC dispatch vs. declared conditions
Σp Pdisp·λp·Δt  ≥  ingreso_mínimo   // If met → offer executes · If not → entire offer withdrawn from pdbc
// An SCO can be parameterised in three ways — all are still one SCO, not separate conditions:
  ① Fixed term only   → ingreso_mínimo > 0 in CAB · no MAV in DET
  ② MAV only         → MAV > 0 in DET per period · no fixed term in CAB
  ③ Both             → ingreso_mínimo + MAV · MAV sets minimum MW if SCO executes
